productDisplayName: Inkfruit Men's War Dark Grey T-shirt
description: CompositionDark grey  round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with grey fabric tape on the inseam of the necklne, graphic print in a distressed look, with brand's website on the frontFittingComfortWash care Hand wash separately in cool water at 30 degrees Do not scrub Do not bleach Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron on reverse Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do not dry clean War is the harbinger of destruction and grief.
